title.zh: 多感官包容性导览牌更新

summary.zh: 以主屏幕、触觉地图、右侧盲文带、侧边Audio按钮、顶部薄膜光伏和可维护底座组成节点级导览系统。
summary.en: A node-level wayfinding system combining main screen, tactile map, right-side braille strip, side audio buttons, top thin-film solar element, and maintainable base.

role.zh: 显示节点信息、路线推荐、简化地图和双语界面。
role.en: Shows node information, route recommendation, simplified map, and bilingual interface.

accessibility.zh: 大字号、高对比和语音入口降低阅读负担。
accessibility.en: Large type, high contrast, and audio entry reduce reading load.

role.zh: 以凸起路线表达当前位置、下一节点和运河方向。
role.en: Uses raised route cues for current position, next stop, and canal direction.

accessibility.zh: 适合视障用户用手指建立空间关系。
accessibility.en: Helps blind and low-vision visitors build spatial relationships through touch.

role.zh: 在900mm–1200mm可触达高度整合节点名、位置、方向和风险提示。
role.en: Integrates node name, location, direction, and risk notice at a 900-1200mm reachable height.

accessibility.zh: 让使用者无需面对屏幕即可确认导览信息。
accessibility.en: Allows confirmation without facing or reading the visual screen.

role.zh: 四个形状不同的按钮分别触发当前位置、下一节点、本地介绍和无障碍路线语音。
role.en: Four differently shaped buttons trigger current location, next stop, local introduction, and accessible route audio.

accessibility.zh: 通过形状差异支持无视觉识别和高频触摸。
accessibility.en: Shape differences support non-visual recognition and frequent use.

name.zh: 顶部薄膜光伏辅助模块

role.zh: 作为辅助供电构件，与顶部构造整合。
role.en: Works as an auxiliary power element integrated with the top structure.

accessibility.zh: 降低日常能耗并支持低维护运行。
accessibility.en: Reduces daily energy use and supports low-maintenance operation.

role.zh: 容纳检修板、锚固结构和可替换模块接口。
role.en: Houses maintenance panel, anchoring structure, and replaceable module interfaces.

accessibility.zh: 稳定设备并降低维修对历史街区空间的干扰。
accessibility.en: Stabilizes the device and reduces maintenance disruption in the historic district.

priority_message.zh: 确认当前位置，选择适合的导览路线。
priority_message.en: Confirm current position and choose a suitable route.

map_note.zh: 简化地图只显示当前位置、下一节点、运河方向和主要路线。
map_note.en: The simplified map shows only current position, next stop, canal direction, and main route.

route_cue.zh: 沿主导览线前往下一节点。
route_cue.en: Follow the primary wayfinding line to the next node.

accessibility_cue.zh: 优先选择平缓、连续、易识别的路径。
accessibility_cue.en: Prioritize level, continuous, and legible paths.

canal_reference.zh: 运河作为南北向空间参照。
canal_reference.en: The canal works as a north-south spatial reference.

summary.zh: 以桥体、运河和街区入口为三重参照，帮助初访者在桥头快速确认方向。
summary.en: Uses bridge, canal, and district entry as three references for first-time orientation.

priority_message.zh: 确认桥头位置，选择进入桥西街区或前往码头。
priority_message.en: Confirm the bridgehead and choose entry into Qiaoxi or the wharf direction.

map_note.zh: 简化地图突出桥体、运河方向和四个电子导览牌点位。
map_note.en: The simplified map highlights bridge, canal direction, and the four totem sites.

route_cue.zh: 从桥头进入街区后可前往吴理人民俗艺术馆。
route_cue.en: Enter the district from the bridgehead toward Wuli Folk Art Museum.

accessibility_cue.zh: 桥头人流较多，先听取方向与安全提示。
accessibility_cue.en: The bridgehead is busy; listen for direction and safety cues first.

canal_reference.zh: 运河是判断南北方向的主要参照。
canal_reference.en: The canal is the main north-south reference.

title.zh: 民俗记忆停留型导览牌

summary.zh: 以地方生活记忆为主题，为进入街区后的文化停留提供轻量说明和下一站方向。
summary.en: Frames local memory as a quiet cultural pause after entering the district.

priority_message.zh: 这里适合短暂停留，理解桥西的地方生活和民俗线索。
priority_message.en: Pause briefly here to read local life and folk culture cues.

map_note.zh: 简化地图显示民俗艺术馆与历史文化馆之间的步行联系。
map_note.en: The simplified map shows the walking connection to the historic culture museum.

route_cue.zh: 继续前往中国大运河拱宸桥桥西历史文化馆。
route_cue.en: Continue toward the historic culture museum.

accessibility_cue.zh: 适合停留阅读，也可使用 Ask the Site 语音入口。
accessibility_cue.en: Suitable for pausing; the Ask the Site voice entry can be used.

canal_reference.zh: 从生活记忆节点重新连接到运河历史解释。
canal_reference.en: Reconnect local memory to canal history interpretation.

summary.zh: 聚合桥、运河、工业遗存与街区更新信息，是四点系统中的主要解释节点。
summary.en: Collects bridge, canal, industrial memory, and renewal information as the main interpretation node.

priority_message.zh: 在此集中理解桥西历史信息，并确认前往旅游码头的方向。
priority_message.en: Read Qiaoxi's historic information here and confirm the direction to the tourist wharf.

map_note.zh: 简化地图强调文化馆、桥头与码头之间的解释关系。
map_note.en: The simplified map emphasizes interpretation links among museum, bridgehead, and wharf.

route_cue.zh: 下一节点为拱宸桥旅游码头，完成水陆转换提示。
route_cue.en: The next node is the tourist wharf, completing land-water transition cues.

accessibility_cue.zh: 阅读信息较多，建议保留语音与大字入口。
accessibility_cue.en: Information is denser here; retain audio and large-text entry.

canal_reference.zh: 运河历史由此转向真实岸线体验。
canal_reference.en: Canal history shifts from interpretation to waterfront experience.

summary.zh: 服务码头抵达、离开和返回桥头的方向确认，同时提示临水空间的安全边界。
summary.en: Supports wharf arrival, departure, return direction, and waterfront safety awareness.

priority_message.zh: 确认码头、岸线和返回桥头方向。
priority_message.en: Confirm wharf position, waterfront edge, and return direction to the bridgehead.

map_note.zh: 简化地图以岸线和桥头作为主要方向参照。
map_note.en: The simplified map uses the waterfront and bridgehead as primary references.

route_cue.zh: 沿岸线返回拱宸桥头，或进入街区继续参观。
route_cue.en: Return along the waterfront to the bridgehead or enter the district.

accessibility_cue.zh: 临水区域请保持安全距离，并优先使用语音确认。
accessibility_cue.en: Keep a safe distance near water and use audio confirmation.

canal_reference.zh: 水体边界是本节点最重要的方向线索。
canal_reference.en: The water edge is the most important directional cue here.

title.zh: 入口方向建立型导览牌

summary.zh: 强调第一次到访时的方向建立、路线选择和触觉总图。
summary.en: Emphasizes first-visit orientation, route choice, and tactile overview.

priority_message.zh: 先建立街区整体结构，再选择经典、无障碍或慢体验路线。
priority_message.en: Read the district structure first, then choose heritage, accessible, or slow route.

map_note.zh: 当前位置位于街区入口，下一推荐节点为中国伞博物馆。
map_note.en: Current position is the district entrance; next recommended stop is China Umbrella Museum.

route_cue.zh: 从入口向东进入展馆前场。
route_cue.en: Move east from the entrance into the museum forecourt.

accessibility_cue.zh: 利用右侧连续建筑界面建立方向。
accessibility_cue.en: Use the continuous building edge on the right for orientation.

canal_reference.zh: 运河方向位于前方偏北侧。
canal_reference.en: The canal direction is forward and slightly north.

title.zh: 展馆前场整合型导览牌

summary.zh: 将展馆入口、前场停留、下一节点方向和无障碍路径整合在同一界面。
summary.en: Integrates museum entry, forecourt pause, next-stop direction, and accessible route in one interface.

priority_message.zh: 优先展示伞博物馆介绍、展馆入口和前往拱宸桥的方向。
priority_message.en: Prioritizes museum introduction, entrance location, and direction toward Gongchen Bridge.

map_note.zh: 简化地图突出展馆前场、入口和西北方向的桥头路线。
map_note.en: The simplified map highlights the forecourt, entrance, and northwest route to the bridgehead.

route_cue.zh: 从展馆入口转向西北侧桥头。
route_cue.en: Turn from the museum entrance toward the northwest bridgehead.

accessibility_cue.zh: 前场平缓，可停留确认语音与触觉信息。
accessibility_cue.en: The level forecourt allows pausing for audio and tactile confirmation.

canal_reference.zh: 运河位于西北方向，作为下一段方向参照。
canal_reference.en: The canal lies northwest and becomes the next orientation reference.

title.zh: 桥头安全与叙事型导览牌

summary.zh: 强化桥头人流、台阶、运河方向和历史叙事的同步提示。
summary.en: Coordinates pedestrian flow, steps, canal direction, and heritage narrative at the bridgehead.

priority_message.zh: 这里是桥西最强空间地标，需同时提示桥体、运河、台阶与下一节点。
priority_message.en: This is Qiaoxi's strongest landmark and must clarify bridge, canal, steps, and next stop.

map_note.zh: 简化地图以桥体弧线和南北向运河作为主要触觉参照。
map_note.en: The simplified map uses the bridge arc and north-south canal as primary tactile references.

route_cue.zh: 从桥头向东南连接大运河博物馆。
route_cue.en: Move southeast from the bridgehead toward Grand Canal Museum.

accessibility_cue.zh: 注意台阶、人流和临水边界。
accessibility_cue.en: Notice steps, crowd flow, and the canal edge.

canal_reference.zh: 南北向运河是此处最稳定的空间线索。
canal_reference.en: The north-south canal is the most stable spatial cue here.

title.zh: 街巷转折确认型导览牌

summary.zh: 服务转角处的方向确认、慢体验路线选择和风险提示。
summary.en: Supports direction confirmation, slow route choice, and risk notice at the turning point.

priority_message.zh: 此处不是景点，而是关键方向确认点，提示游客减速并进入街巷尺度。
priority_message.en: This is not a scenic stop but a direction checkpoint, asking visitors to slow down into lane scale.

map_note.zh: 简化地图强调右转关系、下一休憩点和慢体验路线。
map_note.en: The simplified map emphasizes the right-turn relation, next rest point, and slow route.

route_cue.zh: 在转折点向右进入慢体验街巷。
route_cue.en: Turn right into the slow-experience lane.

accessibility_cue.zh: 通过盲文带和下一节点按钮确认转向。
accessibility_cue.en: Use the braille strip and next-stop button to confirm the turn.

canal_reference.zh: 离开水岸主界面，进入细密街巷肌理。
canal_reference.en: Leave the waterfront interface and enter the finer lane texture.

title.zh: 运河岸线感知型导览牌

summary.zh: 利用连续岸线、水体方向和桥梁关系建立低视力友好的空间参照。
summary.en: Uses continuous waterfront, water direction, and bridge relation as low-vision spatial references.

priority_message.zh: 优先提示水岸边界、安全距离和返回拱宸桥的方向。
priority_message.en: Prioritizes waterfront boundary, safe distance, and direction back to Gongchen Bridge.

map_note.zh: 简化地图以长凸线表示运河岸线，并标出南向返回路径。
map_note.en: The simplified map uses a long raised line for the canal edge and marks the southward return route.

route_cue.en: Follow the waterfront edge south back to the bridgehead.

accessibility_cue.zh: 保持临水安全距离，使用连续岸线作为低视力方向线。
accessibility_cue.en: Keep safe distance from water and use the continuous edge as a low-vision cue.

canal_reference.zh: 水体边界就是本节点的核心参照。
canal_reference.en: The water edge is the core reference of this node.

title.zh: 馆前广场衔接型导览牌

summary.zh: 将大运河叙事、馆前停留、返回桥头和进入慢体验街巷的选择组织在同一节点。
summary.en: Organizes canal narrative, forecourt pause, return to bridgehead, and slow-lane choice at one node.

priority_message.zh: 此处用于连接展馆入口、运河叙事与下一段慢行路线。
priority_message.en: This node connects museum entry, canal narrative, and the next slow-walk segment.

map_note.zh: 简化地图突出馆前广场、返回拱宸桥方向和进入街巷的转向。
map_note.en: The simplified map highlights the forecourt, return direction to Gongchen Bridge, and the turn into lanes.

route_cue.zh: 从馆前广场向西进入街巷转折节点。
route_cue.en: Move west from the forecourt toward the lane transition node.

accessibility_cue.zh: 广场适合停留阅读，转入街巷前先确认路线。
accessibility_cue.en: The forecourt supports pausing before confirming the route into lanes.

canal_reference.zh: 运河叙事在此由展馆内容转为空间体验。
canal_reference.en: The canal narrative shifts here from exhibition content into spatial experience.

title.zh: 慢行休憩确认型导览牌

summary.zh: 服务老年游客、儿童和需要再次确认方向的人群，强化短暂停留与语音重播。
summary.en: Supports senior visitors, children, and people needing reconfirmation through short pause and audio replay.

priority_message.zh: 这里是慢体验路线中的低强度停留点，优先提供休息、方向复核和返回路径。
priority_message.en: This is a low-intensity stop on the slow route, prioritizing rest, direction check, and return path.

map_note.zh: 简化地图标出口袋空间、座椅附近位置和返回拱宸桥的东北方向。
map_note.en: The simplified map marks the pocket space, seating position, and northeast return to Gongchen Bridge.

route_cue.zh: 休息后向东北方向回到桥头主节点。
route_cue.en: After resting, move northeast back to the bridgehead node.

accessibility_cue.zh: 可在此重复播放语音并重新确认触觉路线。
accessibility_cue.en: Replay audio and reconfirm the tactile route here.

canal_reference.zh: 运河方向可通过返回桥头重新建立。
canal_reference.en: The canal direction can be re-established by returning to the bridgehead.
